items.title: Cloud Migration
items.description: Lift-and-shift, re-platform, or re-architect — we guide your workloads to Azure with zero downtime and minimal disruption.

items.title: Managed Azure Infrastructure
items.description: Full lifecycle management of your Azure environment — provisioning, monitoring, patching, and cost governance included.

items.title: Azure Security & Compliance
items.description: Protect your cloud estate with Microsoft Defender, Sentinel SIEM, identity governance, and compliance automation.

items.title: Azure DevOps & CI/CD
items.description: Streamline delivery pipelines with Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, and Infrastructure-as-Code using Bicep and Terraform.

items.title: Azure AI & Analytics
items.description: Unlock business intelligence and AI capabilities with Azure OpenAI, Synapse Analytics, and Power BI integration.

items.title: 24/7 Managed Support
items.description: Round-the-clock NOC and SOC support from Azure-certified engineers with guaranteed SLA response times.
